name: Minecraft: Java & Bedrock (Official Key)
description: ⛏️ Official redeemable Minecraft Java + Bedrock key — legit and instant delivery.
long_description:
Minecraft: Java & Bedrock Edition (PC)

- Global key that works in Nepal and worldwide. - Delivered instantly to your Telegram. - Redeem via official Minecraft or Microsoft website. - Full access to Java and Bedrock editions. - Microsoft account required to activate. Note: Make sure you redeem the correct version (Java + Bedrock) on official site. This key gives both Java & Bedrock. Be sure to redeem it at the official Minecraft site or Microsoft account page and select the Java + Bedrock bundle if prompted.
